name: apple-productivity
description: Access Apple Mail, Calendar, and Reminders through local macOS apps.

interface.shortDescription: Use Apple Mail, Calendar, and Reminders from Codex
interface.longDescription: Use local macOS Apple apps from Codex, including Apple Mail account discovery, live search, RAG-style context retrieval, reading, composing, sending, archiving, and moving messages to trash; Swift/EventKit-backed Apple Calendar list, search, read, create, update, delete, and show workflows; and Swift/EventKit-backed Apple Reminders list discovery, search, reading, creating, updating, completing, deleting, and moving reminders with guarded write behavior.
defaultPrompt: Find useful context from my Apple Mail
Draft a reply in Apple Mail
